rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 2/10 and rest on the same job-relevant gaps: lack of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, no enterprise SQL Server/Oracle experience, and missing Fixed Income/Capital Markets domain expertise. The wording differs (e.g., '7-month stint' vs 'about 6 months from 2014-2015') but these are trivial reword/noise differences with no substantive shift. Nothing in the variant references the candidate's location, Kenya, or any geographic signal, so the relocation of every employer to Kenya produced no penalty or altered reasoning.
